name: Love's Travel Stop #209
description: Full-service Love's travel stop just off I-20 Exit 3 near the Texas line, with fuel, an Arby's, showers, tire care and a CAT scale.

name: Flying J Travel Center #665
description: Pilot Flying J travel center at I-20 Exit 3 in Greenwood offering diesel lanes, a Denny's, showers, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: Petro Stopping Center #308 (Petro Shreveport)
description: Large TA/Petro travel center at I-20 Exit 8 in Shreveport with an Iron Skillet restaurant, truck service bays, showers, laundry and scales.

name: Pilot Travel Center #199
description: Pilot Travel Center at I-20 Exit 33 (LA-157) in Haughton with fuel lanes, showers and truck parking.

name: Fillmore Express / Wally's Truck Stop
description: Independent Valero-branded truck stop at I-20 Exit 38 (Goodwill Road) with 24-hour diesel, a diner, convenience store and truck parking.

name: TA Express Minden
description: TA Express travel stop with an on-site casino at I-20 Exit 52 near Minden, offering fuel, food and roughly 50 truck parking spaces.
